prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次约 9599→10403→10153→9144→8837，近 3 年呈先降后升走势，2025 年基准约 8837 名，较 2024 年回升约 300 名，显示该校在江苏物理类考生中吸引力有所恢复；本省物理类计划 2021 年 67 人、2022 年 76 人、2023–2025 年均为 74 人；2026 年计划大幅增至 92 人，较 2025 年扩招 18 人（+24.3%），扩招幅度显著，将直接拉低录取门槛，位次预计明显后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜排名持续上升：2021 年第 30→2024 年第 27→2025 年第 25→2026 年第 24，近年稳步提升，体现学校综合实力增强，对高分考生吸引力增加；2024 年曾出现招生沟通不畅导致投档线暴跌 500 名的负面舆情（高关注），但 2025 年位次已回升至 8837，显示负面冲击已消化；抖音热度总排名第 13（高热），综合热度 387 万+，短视频平台曝光量大，有助于维持报考关注度；第五轮学科评估 A+ 学科 5 个（作物学、兽医学、畜牧学、草学、食品科学与工程），A 级学科 2 个（植物保护、生物学），农林学科实力全国顶尖，食品科学与工程等专业社会热度高。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续 高热，与该校计算机类、电子信息类等招生专业契合；江苏省物理类考生 2021 年 16.6 万→2025 年 26.1 万持续增长，2026 年总考生 52.1 万，按历史比例估算物理类约 37.9 万人，竞争进一步加剧，整体竞争强度上升；中国农业大学位于北京，对江苏考生有较强地域吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 8837、2026 年大幅扩招 24.3%（位次后移主因）、软科排名持续上升至第 24 位（部分抵消扩招影响）、抖音高热曝光、江苏省物理类考生持续增加等因素，预计 2026 年物理类最低位次约 10027 名，区间 9527–10527 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 9599→10403→10153→9144→8837. In the past 3 years, it showed a trend of first decreasing then increasing. The 2025 baseline is about 8837, an increase of about 300 places compared to 2024, indicating a recovery in attractiveness among Jiangsu Physics Category candidates. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 67 in 2021, 76 in 2022, and 74 from 2023 to 2025. In 2026, the plan significantly increases to 92, an expansion of 18 students (+24.3%) compared to 2025. This substantial expansion will directly lower the admission threshold, and the ranking is expected to shift significantly backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking has been rising: 30th in 2021→27th in 2024→25th in 2025→24th in 2026, steadily improving in recent years, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength and increased attractiveness to high-scoring candidates. In 2024, there was negative public opinion due to poor admission communication leading to a 500-place drop in the admission line (high attention), but the ranking recovered to 8837 in 2025, showing the negative impact has been absorbed. Douyin popularity ranks 13th overall (high heat), with comprehensive heat of 3.87 million+, large exposure on short video platforms, helping maintain application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 5 A+ disciplines (Crop Science, Veterinary Medicine, Animal Science, Grassland Science, Food Science and Engineering), 2 A-level disciplines (Plant Protection, Biology). Agricultural and forestry disciplines are top nationally, and majors like Food Science and Engineering have high social popularity.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity, aligning with the university's Computer Science, Electronic Information and other enrollment majors. The number of Physics Category candidates in Jiangsu Province increased from 166,000 in 2021 to 261,000 in 2025, with a continuous growth. In 2026, total candidates are 521,000, with an estimated 379,000 in Physics Category based on historical proportions, further intensifying competition. China Agricultural University is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal to Jiangsu candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 8837, the significant 24.3% enrollment expansion in 2026 (main reason for ranking shift), the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking to 24th (partially offsetting the expansion impact), high Douyin heat exposure, and the continuous increase in Jiangsu Physics Category candidates, the estimated minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 10027, with a range of 9527–10527.

- Science Experimental Class (Information Science)

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 9527–10527, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (<9527), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 popular majors like Science Experimental Class and Computer Science. If your ranking is around the middle of the range (about 10000), prioritize Tier 2 majors such as Food Science and Engineering and Mathematics. If your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (>10527), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors like Agronomy and Horticulture as safety options.

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 2030、2026 年历史类计划扩招 94.4%（位次后移核心因素）、软科排名提升（部分抵消扩招影响）、抖音高热曝光、历史类考生规模扩大等因素，预计 2026 年历史类最低位次约 3130 名，区间 2660–3600 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1749→1585→1604→1506→2030. In 2025, it significantly dropped to 2030, a decrease of about 524 places from 2024, marking the lowest level in the past 5 years, indicating intensified competition. The provincial History Category enrollment plan was 3 students in 2021, 9 in 2022, 7 in 2023–2024, and 18 in 2025. In 2026, the plan sharply increases to 35 students, an expansion of 17 students (+94.4%) compared to 2025. This substantial expansion will significantly lower the admission threshold, and the ranking is expected to drop considerably.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; the main ranking of Soft Science has been rising to 24th in 2026, indicating steadily enhanced comprehensive strength, which is also attractive to liberal arts candidates. In 2024, there was negative enrollment publicity (a sharp drop of 500 places in admission scores), but it mainly affected the Physics Category; no obvious negative signals for History Category. Douyin popularity ranks 13th overall (high heat), with high overall exposure, helping maintain application enthusiasm. The university's liberal arts majors (Economics, Law, Sociology, Business Administration, Rural Regional Development, Communication) have not been individually rated in discipline evaluations; although the university's overall A+ disciplines in agriculture and forestry do not directly correspond to liberal arts majors, the 985 platform still attracts liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is socially recommended (slightly hot), Economics is divided and wait-and-see, Business Administration is clearly discouraged. The number of History Category candidates in Jiangsu Province was 95,000 in 2021 → 97,000 in 2025, basically stable. In 2026, total candidates are 521,000, with an estimated 142,000 in History Category based on historical proportion, indicating an expanded candidate pool and slightly increased competition intensity. China Agricultural University is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal for liberal arts candidates in Jiangsu.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2030, the 94.4% expansion of History Category enrollment in 2026 (core factor for ranking decline), the improvement in Soft Science ranking (partially offsetting the expansion impact), high Douyin exposure, and the expansion of History Category candidate pool, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will be approximately 3130, with a range of 2660–3600.

If your ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (<2660), you can aim for Tier 1 majors like Law and Economics. If your ranking is in the middle of the range (around 3130), focus on Business Administration. If your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (>3600), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors like Sociology and Rural Regional Development as safety.
